Build a complete Python implementation of a distributed tracing system that automatically instruments all function calls using decorators, propagates trace context through async boundaries using contextvars, exports spans to an OpenTelemetry collector, and provides a local web UI for viewing traces.

Write a full Go implementation of a multi-tenant API gateway that authenticates requests using JWT, enforces per-tenant rate limits using a sliding window algorithm backed by Redis, rewrites URLs based on routing rules stored in etcd, and logs all requests to a centralized logging service.

Implement a complete TypeScript implementation of a reactive event sourcing framework where aggregates are rebuilt from event streams, projections are updated incrementally, snapshots are taken periodically, and optimistic concurrency is enforced using version numbers.

Build a Python script that performs automated extraction of business logic from a legacy PHP codebase by parsing PHP files using tree-sitter, identifying controller and model patterns, and generating equivalent FastAPI and SQLAlchemy code.

Write a complete Node.js implementation of a distributed workflow engine that executes long-running business processes defined as state machines, persists state to PostgreSQL, handles timeouts and retries, and supports human approval steps via webhook callbacks.

Implement a full Go implementation of a data pipeline that reads Avro-encoded messages from Apache Kafka, applies schema evolution using a schema registry, transforms records using a pluggable transformation DSL, and writes results to Apache Parquet files on S3.

Build a complete Python implementation of a knowledge graph reasoning engine that stores RDF triples in a graph database, performs SPARQL query evaluation, infers new triples using OWL reasoning rules, and provides a REST API for querying the knowledge base.

Write a TypeScript implementation of a full-featured permissions system with hierarchical roles, attribute-based access control policies, policy inheritance, real-time policy evaluation, and an audit log of all access decisions with contextual metadata.

Implement a Python script that performs automated infrastructure cost attribution by parsing AWS Cost Explorer data, correlating costs with application services using resource tags, and generating detailed cost allocation reports with trend analysis and anomaly detection.

Build a complete Go implementation of a streaming data processing engine that ingests events from multiple sources, applies windowed aggregations using tumbling and sliding windows, detects anomalies using statistical models, and outputs alerts to multiple notification channels.

Write a full Python implementation of a compiler for a statically-typed functional programming language that supports algebraic data types, pattern matching, type inference using Hindley-Milner, and compiles to Python bytecode.

Implement a complete Node.js implementation of a real-time bidding platform that processes bid requests within 100ms, applies targeting rules, selects winning bids using second-price auction logic, tracks impressions via pixel tracking, and generates billing reports.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a declarative UI testing framework that renders React components in a virtual DOM, executes user interaction scenarios defined in YAML, captures screenshots at each step, and compares them against visual baselines.

Write a Python class that implements a distributed vector database with approximate nearest neighbor search using HNSW indexing, supports CRUD operations on high-dimensional vectors, handles shard rebalancing, and provides a gRPC query interface.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a multi-region active-active database replication system that detects write conflicts using vector clocks, applies last-write-wins or custom merge functions, and maintains causal consistency across regions.

Build a Python script that performs automated generation of synthetic financial transaction data with realistic statistical properties including seasonality, fraud patterns, and merchant category distributions for use in machine learning model training.

Write a full TypeScript implementation of a server-side rendering framework with streaming HTML delivery, component-level caching, hydration of interactive components on the client, and automatic code splitting based on route boundaries.

Implement a Python class that provides a high-performance message serialization library supporting multiple wire formats including Protocol Buffers, MessagePack, and CBOR, with automatic schema versioning and backward compatibility validation.

Build a complete Go implementation of a self-balancing distributed hash table that automatically rebalances partitions when nodes join or leave, replicates data across multiple nodes for durability, and provides linearizable reads and writes.

Write a Node.js implementation of a multi-model AI inference server that loads multiple ML models, manages GPU memory allocation across concurrent requests, implements request batching for throughput optimization, and exposes a unified REST API.

Implement a full Python implementation of a chaos engineering platform that automatically discovers services in a Kubernetes cluster, generates failure injection scenarios, executes them in a controlled manner, and measures the impact on system reliability metrics.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a compile-time checked configuration library where all configuration keys and their types are defined in a schema, invalid access patterns are caught at build time, and runtime values are validated against the schema.

Write a Python script that performs automated migration of a MySQL database schema to PostgreSQL by parsing MySQL DDL, converting data types, transforming stored procedures, and generating a migration plan with rollback scripts.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a network topology discovery tool that uses ICMP probing, SNMP polling, and BGP route inspection to build a dynamic map of network devices, links, and routing paths.

Build a Python class that implements a complete implementation of the OAuth 2.1 authorization server with authorization code flow with PKCE, device authorization flow, token introspection, and dynamic client registration.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a distributed cache invalidation system where cache entries are tagged with dependency keys, writes to any tagged resource automatically invalidate all related cache entries across all nodes.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a reactive database client that wraps a PostgreSQL connection, exposes table changes as observable streams using logical replication, and allows building reactive data pipelines with RxJS operators.

Build a Python script that performs automated detection of memory leaks in long-running Python processes by sampling object counts at regular intervals, computing growth rates per type, and generating heap snapshots for differential analysis.

Write a complete Go implementation of a service dependency injection framework that scans Go packages for dependency declarations using struct tags, resolves the dependency graph at startup, and supports scoped lifetimes for request-scoped dependencies.

Implement a full Python implementation of a distributed stream processing system that partitions infinite event streams across worker processes, handles exactly-once processing using idempotency keys, and provides watermark-based handling of late-arriving events.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a zero-downtime schema migration runner that analyzes the impact of schema changes on running queries, applies migrations in a backward-compatible sequence, and monitors for query errors during the migration window.

Write a Python class that implements a multi-armed bandit based hyperparameter optimizer that adaptively allocates compute budget to promising hyperparameter configurations using successive halving and early stopping.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a gRPC service mesh that intercepts all inter-service calls, enforces mutual TLS, applies traffic policies including retries and timeouts, and collects telemetry for distributed tracing.

Build a Python script that performs automated analysis of microservice communication patterns by parsing distributed traces, identifying tight coupling between services, detecting synchronous call chains, and recommending event-driven alternatives.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a multi-tenant search service that indexes documents per tenant using separate Elasticsearch indices, supports tenant-specific relevance tuning, and provides federated search across multiple tenants.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a functional state management library with immutable state updates via structural sharing, computed selectors with memoization, middleware for side effects, and time-travel debugging support.

Build a Python class that provides a distributed saga implementation with choreography-based coordination where services publish events and react to others' events, maintaining eventual consistency without a central orchestrator.

Write a complete Go implementation of an intelligent prefetching proxy that learns access patterns from request history, proactively fetches resources before they are requested, and measures cache hit improvement.

Implement a full Python implementation of a database query federation engine that translates SQL queries into API calls against multiple REST services, joins results in memory, and returns a unified response.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a component-driven design system generator that takes design tokens as input and generates React components, CSS custom properties, Storybook stories, and accessibility-compliant markup.

Write a Python script that performs automated identification and extraction of domain entities from a large codebase by analyzing class names, database schemas, and API contracts using NLP and clustering techniques.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a distributed lock-free queue that supports multiple producers and consumers across network nodes using a combination of optimistic concurrency and compare-and-swap operations.
Build a Python class that implements a complete parser and interpreter for a subset of the Lua scripting language including tables, closures, metatables, coroutines, and a basic standard library.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a multi-protocol push notification service that delivers messages to iOS via APNs, Android via FCM, and web browsers via Web Push, with delivery tracking and retry logic.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a fully functional dependency resolver similar to npm's package resolution algorithm, handling version ranges, peer dependencies, conflict detection, and lockfile generation.

Build a Python script that performs automated generation of end-to-end tests for a GraphQL API by introspecting the schema, generating valid queries for all types, executing them, and asserting response structure correctness.

Write a complete Go implementation of a real-time collaborative document editing server using the Yjs CRDT protocol, handling document state synchronization, awareness information, and persistent storage of document history.

Implement a full Python implementation of a streaming recommendation engine that updates user and item embeddings in real time as new interactions arrive, using an online matrix factorization algorithm.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a plugin-based code analysis framework where plugins define AST visitor patterns, share analysis results through a typed context, and report findings in a structured format.

Write a Python class that provides a distributed event bus with topic partitioning, consumer group semantics, at-least-once delivery guarantees, message replay from any offset, and schema validation using Avro.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a network-aware task scheduler that places tasks on worker nodes based on data locality, minimizing network transfer by scheduling computation close to where data resides.

Build a Python script that performs automated refactoring of a monolithic Django application into domain-driven microservices by analyzing model relationships, extracting bounded contexts, and generating service boilerplate.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a real-time fraud detection engine that processes payment transactions as a stream, applies rule-based and ML-based scoring, flags suspicious patterns, and blocks high-risk transactions in under 50ms.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a type-safe command-line argument parser that infers argument types and validation rules from TypeScript types, generates help text automatically, and returns strongly typed parsed arguments.

Build a Python class that implements a distributed inverted index for full-text search where document shards are distributed across nodes, queries are broadcast to all shards, and results are merged and ranked centrally.

Write a complete Go implementation of a consensus-based configuration management system where all cluster nodes must agree on configuration changes using Raft before they are applied, with support for configuration history and rollback.

Implement a full Python implementation of a data lakehouse query engine that reads Parquet files from S3, applies predicate pushdown and column pruning, performs hash joins across tables, and returns results in Arrow format.

Build a TypeScript implementation of an intelligent API throttling library that dynamically adjusts request rates based on server response headers, queues excess requests, and provides backpressure to callers.

Write a Python script that performs automated generation of infrastructure diagrams from Terraform state files by parsing resource definitions, inferring relationships, and producing architecture diagrams in multiple formats.
Implement a complete Go implementation of a hot-swappable plugin system where plugins are compiled as shared libraries, loaded at runtime, and can be replaced without restarting the host process.

Build a Python class that provides a distributed time series forecasting system that trains ARIMA models per metric, detects seasonality, generates multi-step forecasts, and provides prediction intervals.
Write a full Node.js implementation of a multi-tenant email delivery service with template management, per-tenant SMTP configuration, bounce handling, unsubscribe management, and delivery analytics.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a lazy evaluation engine for a functional programming language where expressions are only evaluated when their values are needed, with memoization of evaluated thunks.

Build a Python script that performs automated analysis of API usage patterns from access logs to identify deprecated endpoint usage, estimate migration effort, and generate client-specific migration guides.

Write a complete Go implementation of a service that continuously monitors a Kubernetes cluster for resource waste, identifies over-provisioned deployments based on actual utilization metrics, and generates right-sizing recommendations.
Implement a full Python implementation of a genetic algorithm-based neural architecture search system that evolves network topologies to maximize validation accuracy on a given dataset.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a real-time collaborative drawing application backend with shape broadcasting, conflict resolution using operational transformation, undo/redo history per user, and persistent canvas state.
Write a Python class that implements a distributed circuit breaker coordinator where all instances of a service share circuit state via Redis pub/sub, preventing thundering herd on recovery.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a request deduplication middleware that identifies duplicate API requests within a time window using request fingerprinting and returns cached responses to duplicates.

Build a Python script that performs automated generation of database indexing strategies by analyzing query workloads from slow query logs, simulating index candidates, and predicting query performance improvements.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a real-time sports data aggregation service that fetches data from multiple sports APIs, normalizes it into a common schema, and broadcasts updates via WebSocket to subscribed clients.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a full-featured mock server that records real API interactions, generates realistic mock responses with configurable scenarios, and validates request contracts against OpenAPI specs.

Build a Python class that provides a distributed read-replica routing layer that tracks replication lag per replica, routes read queries to the replica with acceptable lag, and falls back to the primary on lag spikes.

Write a complete Go implementation of a binary diff and patch tool that computes minimal diffs between binary files using the Myers diff algorithm, generates compact patch files, and applies patches with integrity verification.

Implement a full Python implementation of a workflow-as-code system where business workflows are defined as Python coroutines, persisted across process restarts using event sourcing, and executed reliably with automatic retry.

Build a TypeScript implementation of an extensible linting framework for a custom DSL where lint rules are defined as plugins, each rule analyzes an AST node type, and violations are reported with suggested fixes.

Write a Python script that performs automated detection of sensitive data exposure in application logs by scanning log files using regex patterns and ML classifiers to identify PII, secrets, and credentials.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a distributed key rotation service that manages encryption keys across multiple services, rotates keys on a schedule, re-encrypts data transparently, and provides key escrow.
Build a Python class that implements a complete HTTP/2 client from scratch with connection multiplexing, stream prioritization, server push handling, and HPACK header compression.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a server that executes sandboxed user-provided JavaScript code using isolated VM contexts, enforces CPU and memory limits, captures stdout, and streams results back to the client.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a distributed voting system with ballot creation, voter authentication using blind signatures, anonymous vote casting, tallying with homomorphic encryption, and public verifiability.

Build a Python script that performs automated generation of load test scripts from production traffic captures by clustering request patterns into representative scenarios and generating k6 or Locust test files.

Write a complete Go implementation of a custom container image builder that reads a Dockerfile-like specification, downloads base layers, applies layer operations, computes content-addressable layer hashes, and pushes to a registry.

Implement a full Python implementation of a streaming anomaly detection system that learns normal behavior patterns from historical time series data and detects deviations in real time using isolation forests.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a compile-time internationalization system where translation keys are validated at build time against translation files, missing keys cause compilation errors, and pluralization rules are type-safe.
Write a Python class that provides a memory-efficient streaming JSON serializer that produces JSON output incrementally for large nested data structures without buffering the entire output in memory.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a distributed leader election system using bully algorithm with network partition tolerance, leader health monitoring, and automatic re-election on leader failure.

Build a Python script that performs automated reverse engineering of binary protocols by capturing network traffic, clustering message structures, inferring field boundaries, and generating Python parsers for each message type.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a content moderation pipeline that processes user-generated content through multiple stages including spam detection, toxicity scoring, image analysis, and human review routing.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a reactive data grid component with virtual scrolling for millions of rows, server-side filtering and sorting, inline cell editing with validation, and Excel-compatible copy-paste.

Build a Python class that implements a graph-based dependency resolver that handles optional dependencies, version constraints, conflict detection, and outputs a dependency tree with resolution explanations.

Write a complete Go implementation of a distributed read-heavy caching system with cache warming on startup, probabilistic early expiration to prevent cache stampedes, and detailed cache efficiency metrics.

Implement a full Python implementation of a model serving platform that loads PyTorch models, performs dynamic batching of inference requests, manages GPU memory across model versions, and exposes a gRPC prediction API.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a schema-first API development framework that generates TypeScript types, validation middleware, OpenAPI documentation, and mock implementations from a single schema definition.

Write a Python script that performs automated cost-benefit analysis of database query optimizations by estimating query costs before and after optimization, projecting cost savings based on query frequency, and prioritizing optimization opportunities.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a distributed configuration store with watch support where clients receive real-time notifications of configuration changes, with optimistic locking to prevent lost updates.

Build a Python class that provides a streaming SQL execution engine that processes queries over unbounded data streams, supports windowed joins between streams, and handles exactly-once processing semantics.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a data lineage tracking system that captures the transformation history of data as it flows through a pipeline, stores lineage graphs in Neo4j, and provides a REST API for querying data provenance.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a bidirectional data binding library that synchronizes state between React components and a backend API, handles optimistic updates, conflict resolution, and offline support.

Build a Python script that performs automated detection and remediation of Kubernetes cluster misconfigurations by scanning resource definitions against security best practices and generating patched resource manifests.
